about.heading: Built for New Orleans
about.body: We're a New Orleans concrete team that knows how to work with local soil conditions. One call gets you straight answers and solid results.

reviews.name: Michelle J.
reviews.text: Very pleased with the decorative concrete work. Professional job and Mr. Dillon was knowledgeable about the latest concrete techniques. I've recommended Dependable Concrete to my family.

cta.heading: Ready to pour your concrete project?
cta.body: Get a free estimate on your driveway, patio, or decorative concrete work. Local team, honest pricing, solid results.
